title: Icon
text: Icon Specifies the application icon to be used when the application (or session panel) is minimized. This setting applies only to the Uniface runtime on Windows, not to the Uniface IDE. Icon = FileName Arguments FileName —name of the .ico file Default value: None File section: [application] Description This setting has no effect on the icon displayed in the application shortcut. To change the icon in the shortcut, edit its properties and choose another image. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
